session_note: S42 — BUG-CRITICAL-1: Real-Time 1v1 Restoration. User reported turn-based gameplay (PLAYER 2'S TURN · SPACE to end) shipped in S15 P2 contradicts SPARK_Blueprint.md:3 'Real-Time Multiplayer'. Both players cannot act simultaneously; non-active-player Intents silently rejected by requireActivePlayer gate; primitives snap back to spawn for non-active player. Full teardown of turn-based system + first-Intent-wins race resolution + diagnostics counter for observability. SHIPPED commit 6e3bfaf, deploy run 26360989574 (build 26s + deploy 8s = 34s SUCCESS first attempt). 4-layer verification 10/10 PASS.
